issues.description: First effect has wrong condition type. Should check leader's type includes 'Baroque Works' using LeaderHasType, not HasCardOnBoard with name 'Baroque Works'
First effect has wrong action. Should redirect attack target using a redirect/change target action, not Rest the character
DON!! -1 cost mechanism is missing. Counter cards with DON!! cost need to represent this, though current DSL may not have a cost field
Second effect with Trigger trigger and DrawCard action does not exist in the official text at all. This appears to be from a different card entirely
